purpose: checked supervisor boundary for the production-shaped retained-source proof that must fail closed at the explicit live-source gate before any preflight, dry-run, or apply mutation, while keeping the first remaining production-only boundary visible

live_source_gate.stderr: REPRINT_PUSH_LIVE_SOURCE_REQUIRED: production push requires a live source URL; provide REPRINT_PUSH_SOURCE_URL before running preflight, dry-run, or apply.
live_source_gate.checked_output: exact live-source gate before preflight, dry-run, or apply

first_remaining_production_boundary.name: auth/session lifecycle and durable journal semantics

durable_journal.storage_lease_fence: production durable journal storage, lease, and fencing are not yet proven beyond the retained Playground journal path

pull_to_push_bridge.exporter: discovers the merge base and coverage evidence before any push request exists
pull_to_push_bridge.importer: persists the immutable pull base package as the only origin push may consume
pull_to_push_bridge.push_preflight: binds the persisted pull base package to one live remote identity and one short-lived push session
pull_to_push_bridge.push_remote_snapshot_hash_listing: reads the live remote comparison surface for planning only and never becomes write authority
pull_to_push_bridge.push_plan_dry_run: uploads the canonical plan as a receipt, not a lock
pull_to_push_bridge.push_batch_apply: revalidates fresh live evidence before every batch and again at the storage boundary
pull_to_push_bridge.push_journal_inspect: records durable evidence without authorizing mutation
pull_to_push_bridge.push_journal: records durable evidence without authorizing mutation
pull_to_push_bridge.push_recover inspect: reads the journal and fresh live hashes before any mutating repair
